* Copyright licenses
** License|Mojang|Mojang images
* Free licenses, only if applicable
** License|CC-BY|Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 License
** License|CC-BY-NC|Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 3.0 License
** License|CC-BY-NC-ND|Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 3.0 License
** License|CC-BY-NC-SA|Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 3.0 License
** License|CC-BY-ND|Creative Commons Attribution-NoDerivs 3.0 License
** License|CC-BY-SA|Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 3.0 License
** License|CC0|CC0 1.0 License
** License|CC-SRR|Creative Commons Some Rights Reserved License
** License|CC-PD|Public domain
* Unknown license
** License|Unknown license
